title: Infosys collaborates with RWE AG for automated digital workplace transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with RWE AG, a German multinational energy company, to drive automated digital workplace transformation and improve operational efficiency. The collaboration will use Infosys Workplace Suite to implement automation and self-service solutions for RWE. Infosys stated it has worked with RWE for over 12 years and will support modernization of RWE’s workplace with a focus on user centricity and sustainability. No deal value, duration, or financial impact was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with RWE AG to drive automated digital workplace transformation and improve operational efficiency.

key_facts.fact: The collaboration will leverage Infosys Workplace Suite to implement solutions that automate processes and enable self-service options.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with RWE AG to Drive Automated Digital Workplace Transformation

key_facts.fact: Infosys has collaborated with RWE as a trusted partner for over 12 years, supporting modernization and business transformation initiatives.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with RWE AG to Drive Automated Digital Workplace Transformation

key_facts.fact: The transformation will use tools including migration factory for automated Office 365 migration, collaboration apps, business dashboards and reports, Azure-powered conversational bot, service request automation, and governance solutions.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Collaborates with RWE AG to Drive Automated Digital Workplace Transformation

key_facts.fact: No deal value, contract duration, or expected financial impact was disclosed.
